arts.ttl: USMNT Predicted Lineup vs. Guatemala: A Golden Opportunity to Make Gold Cup Final
arts.sum: GK: Matt Freese —The New York City FC goalkeeper came up big in the penalty shootout and is poised to start however many games the USMNT play in this tournament. Mauricio Pochettino's side avoided heartbreak dispatching Costa Rica in a quarterfinal penalty shootout, but at the same time built belief that a trophy this summer is possible.
